truthful_notice: The autonomy model now assigns repository roles and applies role-specific exit gates. The prior 72-repository inventory used a role-neutral runtime-heavy model and remains historical until the scheduled role-aware cycle persists a new inventory, role report, and action queue.

nodes.title: Public ecosystem truth cycle
nodes.current_step: Execute the first role-aware ecosystem rescan and replace the role-neutral queue.

nodes.title: Define repository-role taxonomy
nodes.result: Eight repository roles now have distinct machine-readable exit gates.

nodes.title: Classify repositories by role and exit gate
nodes.current_step: The classifier is installed and wired into the scheduled cycle; its first persisted ecosystem result is pending.

nodes.title: Run role-aware ecosystem rescan
nodes.current_step: Regenerate inventory, role assignments, exit-gate results, and remediation actions from current repository evidence.

nodes.title: Generate role-specific remediation queue
nodes.current_step: Do not preserve runtime-only remediation tasks for libraries, documentation, archives, fixtures, or organizational records unless their role requires them.

nodes.title: Verify public Site runtime
nodes.current_step: The corrected freshness-policy-aware PASS receipt remains unobserved.

nodes.title: Apply role-specific ecosystem completion gate
nodes.current_step: Completion will be recalculated against each repository's actual role rather than a universal runtime-product standard.

corrective_actions.action: Execute and persist the first role-aware public inventory and exit-gate cycle
corrective_actions.reason: The older 71-action queue was generated under a role-neutral completion model and likely overstates unfinished work.

corrective_actions.action: Persist the corrected Site runtime verification result
corrective_actions.reason: The latest stored receipt still reports the pre-repair freshness failure.

completed_history.title: Install role-specific completion model
completed_history.result: Repository taxonomy, exit-gate classifier, role-aware roadmap generator, and scheduled workflow integration were installed.
